name: glucose-log-input
title: Glucose Log Input
description: Blood-glucose entry with explicit unit toggle and context select plus a live classification badge.

props.name: defaultValue
props.type: { value: number | null; unit: "mmol/L" | "mg/dL"; context: GlucoseContext }
props.description: Initial reading, unit, and measurement context.

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Fires on every edit with the structured reading.

clinicalNotes: Never guess the unit — the toggle is explicit and converts the entered number on change (mmol/L to one decimal, mg/dL to a whole number). Classification is informational and context-dependent: the field passes the selected context (fasting/post-meal/random/bedtime) to the badge, but diabetic targets are individual, so it asserts no control. The context is a required part of the value, not an assumption.
notes: Round-2 form component; composes glucose-badge + field + input + select + toggle-group.
